data.title: XRP Case Influences U.S. Crypto Regulation Landscape
data.description: A recent commentary highlights the impact of the XRP case on shaping U.S. cryptocurrency regulations. According to NS3.AI, the case distinguished between retail and institutional sales of XRP, setting a precedent in regulatory approaches. The commentary also notes that senators anticipate the Clarity Act to be enacted by the end of May 2026, which could further define the regulatory framework for digital assets.

data.title: Bitcoin's 30-day implied volatility fell to around 42%, a three-month low.
data.description: A Bitfinex report indicates that Bitcoin's 30-day implied volatility (IV) has fallen to approximately 42%, a near three-month low and a significant drop from the high of around 56% in January-February 2026. Furthermore, the market has experienced negative funding rates for 26 consecutive days, coupled with declining option prices, creating a clear structural asymmetry. If the Bitcoin spot price effectively breaks above the $80,100 level, a target price for short-term holders, the cost of short positions will increase significantly. Currently, the options market has not fully priced in this scenario, suggesting that call options may be systematically undervalued.

data.title: Computershare and Securitize jointly launch compliant equity tokens.
data.description: Computershare, a leading global stock transfer agent and partner of many S&P 500 companies, has officially announced a deep partnership with digital asset platform Securitize, formally entering the stock tokenization arena to help US-listed companies issue on-chain stock tokens. The two companies will launch Issuer-Supported Tokens (ISTs), which US-listed companies can issue on demand. Investors holding on-chain tokenized shares will seamlessly enjoy the same voting rights, legal protections, and shareholder benefits as traditional shareholders, achieving a compliant integration of traditional equity with the blockchain ecosystem. (Forbes)

data.title: Bullish Invests 250 BTC in Bitcoin DeFi Protocol Mezo
data.description: Bullish has invested 250 BTC, valued at approximately $19 million, into the Bitcoin DeFi protocol Mezo. According to NS3.AI, this investment aligns with the launch of Mezo Prime, an institutional yield product developed in collaboration with Anchorage Digital Bank. Bullish plans to utilize a segment of its corporate Bitcoin treasury within this product, which is now accessible to clients of Anchorage Digital Bank.

data.title: Eightco disclosed $333 million in asset reserves: holding 283 million WLD and over 11,000 ETH.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Eightco Holdings (ORBS) released an update on its holdings, showing total assets worth approximately $333 million as of April 27. This includes 283,452,700 Worldcoin (WLD), 11,068 ETH, a $90 million investment in OpenAI, a $25 million investment in Beast Industries, and $121 million in cash and stablecoins. Eightco Holdings stated that its WLD token holdings now represent 21% of its total assets, its OpenAI investment accounts for approximately 27%, and its Beast Industries investment accounts for 8%. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Galaxy released its Q1 financial report: net loss of $216 million dragged down by the decline in the cryptocurrency market.
data.description: Galaxy Digital announced its Q1 2026 financial results, showing a net loss of $216 million, or $0.49 per diluted and adjusted share, impacted by the decline in the crypto asset market during the quarter. The adjusted gross loss was $88 million, and the adjusted EBITDA loss was $188 million. As of March 31, Galaxy Digital had total equity of $2.8 billion and held $2.6 billion in cash and stablecoins. In its digital asset business, Galaxy manages $5 billion in assets and has $3.2 billion in staked assets. BlackRock has selected Galaxy as a validator for its staked Ethereum exchange-traded fund, iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF. Furthermore, Galaxy delivered its first data hall to CoreWeave's Helios data center, officially commencing revenue recognition, and expects to complete the first phase of 133 MW of critical IT load delivery by the end of Q2 2026. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Germany's April CPI Preliminary Rate Shows Slight Decrease
data.description: Germany's Consumer Price Index (CPI) for April recorded a preliminary monthly rate of 0.6%, according to Jin10. This figure is slightly below the expected rate of 0.7% and shows a decrease from the previous month's rate of 1.10%. The CPI is a key indicator of inflation, reflecting changes in the price level of a basket of consumer goods and services.

data.title: Solidus Labs Report Highlights Concentration of Profits in Polymarket
data.description: Solidus Labs has released a report indicating that a small percentage of maker wallets on Polymarket captured a significant portion of gains in politics markets between December 2025 and February 2026. According to NS3.AI, the report reveals that 0.55% of profitable maker wallets accounted for 50% of the gains during this period. Additionally, 0.26% of winning taker wallets captured nearly the same share, amounting to approximately $8 million out of the $16 million in profits for each cohort. Solidus Labs also noted that about 15% of volume in certain markets exhibited patterns consistent with wash trading.

data.title: SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion IPO Set to Make History
data.description:
SpaceX is preparing for an unprecedented $1.75 trillion IPO, according to Odaily. The scale of this IPO is unmatched on Wall Street, especially given SpaceX's complex relationship with the U.S. government. Nasdaq has introduced a 'Fast Entry' rule, allowing newly listed companies to be quickly included in the Nasdaq 100 index if their market value ranks within the top 40. This rule, effective May 1, 2026, is believed to be designed for SpaceX's upcoming listing and may also benefit companies like OpenAI and Anthropic, which could go public in 2026 or 2027.

If SpaceX lists with a valuation of $1.75 trillion and a free float ratio of 25% to 30%, its free float market value on the IPO day would range between $440 billion and $530 billion. This would position SpaceX among the top ten weighted stocks in the Nasdaq 100. Additionally, there are market rumors that the S&P 500 is considering a similar 'Fast Entry' scheme, though details remain undisclosed.

data.title: AI Platform Certifyde Secures $2 Million in Seed Funding
data.description: Certifyde, an artificial intelligence application platform, has announced the completion of a $2 million seed funding round. According to Odaily, the investment was led by K5 Global and Flamingo Capital, with participation from several angel investors including George Ruan, co-founder of Honey, Brad Garlinghouse, CEO of Ripple, and Roland Peralta, co-founder of Nutra.

data.title: UBS Reports Increased Investment Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: UBS, one of the world's largest wealth management firms, has reported that the ongoing Middle East conflict is driving its affluent clients to increase their investments, resulting in net inflows reaching $37 billion in the first three months of 2026. According to Jin10, the bank noted that the fragile environment is prompting clients to seek advice on asset protection and investment opportunities. In the fourth quarter of last year, net inflows were only $8.5 billion, but this figure has seen strong growth, coupled with higher-than-expected first-quarter net profits, leading to a more than 4% rise in UBS's stock price. Chief Financial Officer Todd Tuckner told analysts that the Gulf conflict has encouraged clients to actively adjust and hedge their portfolios while maintaining investments. These actions have supported demand for structured products, foreign exchange products, and equity derivatives.

data.title: The address in the Kingdom of Bhutan transferred approximately 102 bitcoins again 3 hours ago.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, a Bitcoin holding address in the Kingdom of Bhutan has transferred BTC again. About three hours ago, 102 BTC were transferred to an address, worth approximately $7.89 million. The address now holds a total of 184 BTC transferred from the Kingdom of Bhutan.

data.title: Crypto Security Incidents Lead to Significant Losses in April 2026
data.description: April 2026 has been marked as a challenging period for the cryptocurrency sector, with security incidents resulting in losses exceeding $606 million, according to DeFiLlama data. This figure is 3.7 times greater than the total losses recorded in the entire first quarter. According to NS3.AI, April 2026 stands out as the worst month for such losses since February 2025, highlighting ongoing vulnerabilities within the crypto space.

data.title: SharpLink's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have surpassed 18,000 ETH.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company SharpLink announced on the X platform that since launching its ETH treasury strategy, the company's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have reached 18,309 ETH. In addition, the company earned 459 ETH in Ethereum staking rewards last week.

data.title: Caixin: SpaceX's free-float market capitalization on its first day of IPO may be between $440 billion and $530 billion.
data.description: Caixin.com published an article titled "SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion IPO is Imminent: Who Should Buy? Is it Worth Buying?", which points out that Wall Street has never encountered a listed company with such a massive IPO size and such a complex relationship with the US government. Nasdaq has previously passed a new "Fast Entry" rule, allowing newly listed companies whose market capitalization ranks in the top 40 of the Nasdaq 100 index to be quickly included within 15 trading days of listing. This rule will officially take effect on May 1, 2026, and is considered to be designed specifically for the upcoming SpaceX IPO, while also paving the way for OpenAI and Anthropic, which may list in 2026 or 2027. Assuming SpaceX lists with a $1.75 trillion valuation and a free float of 25% to 30%, its free float market capitalization on the first day of the IPO would be approximately between $440 billion and $530 billion. Based on the Nasdaq 100 weighting, SpaceX would directly enter the top ten weighted stocks. Market sources indicate that the S&P 500 is also evaluating some form of "fast-track inclusion," details of which have not yet been released. (Caixin)

data.title: Blockchain Remittance System to Be Tested by Dunamu, Hana Financial Group, and POSCO International
data.description: Dunamu, Hana Financial Group, and POSCO International have entered into a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to explore the use of blockchain technology for remittance systems in real trade transactions. According to NS3.AI, POSCO International will be the first to implement this system in live transactions. The collaboration follows a successful proof of concept that demonstrated reduced settlement times and costs compared to the traditional SWIFT-based process. The companies aim to develop a functional model for real-time blockchain remittances by the end of the year.

data.title: MoonPay acquires crypto security startup Sodot in an all-stock transaction for $100 million.
data.description: MoonPay announced its acquisition of Israeli crypto security startup Sodot in a $100 million all-stock transaction. Following the acquisition, Sodot will be integrated into MoonPay Institutional, a newly formed division. MoonPay Institutional will reportedly provide various cryptocurrency and blockchain services to large traditional financial institutions, including trading, tokenized securities, payments, wallet management, and stablecoin issuance. The division is led by Caroline D. Pham, who joined MoonPay last December as Chief Legal Officer and Chief Administrative Officer. She previously served as Acting Chair of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). (Bloomberg)

data.title: XBIT's trading volume exceeded $36 million in just one month after its launch, ranking it among the top 4 Polymarket Builders.
data.description: As of the end of April, crypto trading aggregator XBIT ranked 4th on the Polymarket Builder official leaderboard with a monthly trading volume of $36.12 million. The project officially launched in early April, and XBIT recently passed the Polymarket Builder official review. Currently, XBIT offers two core product categories: prediction markets and perpetual contracts (Perp DEX). The next step is to launch leveraged prediction markets to further enrich the aggregated trading experience.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Vitalik sold 40 million ASTEROIDs, cashing out approximately $114,600; 2. Kyber hackers transferred stolen funds to Tornado Cash; the hackers involved had previously been indicted by the FBI; 3. A whale is suspected of liquidating 3,418 ETH, with an estimated profit exceeding $1.32 million; 4. The South Korean National Tax Service has begun preparations for virtual asset taxation, scheduled for implementation in January next year; 5. a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen changed the banner on his X account; 6. Ronin will migrate to Ethereum Layer 2 on May 12, and the RON inflation rate will drop below 1%; 7. Trump: Iran should sign a nuclear-free agreement as soon as possible; 8. MegaETH will launch another eight-week Odyssey on the eve of TGE, with a 97% probability of TGE tomorrow; 9. QCP: The market has turned cautious and wait-and-see, with Bitcoin maintaining range-bound trading; 10. BIT: Bitcoin has risen for two consecutive months, and market momentum shows signs of recovery.

data.title: OKX will launch AI perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the AIUSDT perpetual contract on its web, app and API platforms at 20:00 (UTC+8) on April 29, 2026.
